content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom C:12 in the molecule. Looking at the image, I can see that atom C:12 (carbon, index 12) is connected to:

1. C:13 (carbon, index 13) - directly bonded to the right
2. C:17 (carbon, index 17) - directly bonded to the left
3. S:9 (sulfur, index 9) - directly bonded above

These are the three atoms covalently connected to atom C:12.

Regarding the geomconf_index, based on the file name "geomconf_3960.xyz", the geomconf_index for this molecule is 3960.

So the neighbor atoms of atom index 12 (C) are:
- Atom index 13 (C)
- Atom index 17 (C)
- Atom index 9 (S)

And the geomconf_index is 3960.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 12, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
